description: Detects memory leak indicators in PHP: fopen/curl_init/mysql_connect resource handles that may not be properly closed, and array growth patterns in loops. JSON version flags all function_call_expression nodes (cannot filter to resource-acquiring functions or verify fclose pairing without cross-statement analysis). Precision reduced per D-09.

flag.message: Function call detected -- verify resource-acquiring calls (fopen, curl_init, mysql_connect) have corresponding close/free calls (fclose, curl_close, mysql_close) to prevent resource leaks
